title: Paper Talismans
description: This is a simple magic mod that adds paper talismans that you can add effects to.
body:
Paper Talismans is a mod that adds several ancient-Chinese themed talismans that can do various things. As of 1.0.0, There are three talismans.

# The Talismans

There is a Strength Talisman, which gives you the **strength** effect for several minutes.
One Resistance Talisman, which gives you the **resistance** effect for several minutes.
And One Fire Talismanm, which **launches a fireball** at your opponents.
## How to Make Them
You craft talismans out of 4 paper. In order to load the talismans, you have to make bamboo slips out of 3 bamboo, then use them to get different Fulus. You then craft the Fulus with the blank Talismans and get a talisman to use.
